content: I walked through a blue door into starlight and a silver river that reflected impossible constellations.
I walked through a blue door into starlight and a silver river that reflected impossible constellations.

text: Soaring through crystalline architecture, each building a different geometric pattern. Flying gives perfect control—I can zoom into details or pull back for overview.

Pattern emerging: Architectural complexity correlates with lucidity depth. When I'm in geometrically complex spaces, I maintain lucidity longer and have better control. Flying in these spaces feels like exploring solution spaces—each building is a different approach.
Lantern Garage is alive. The flame is visible. Time to explore.
